chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No.632 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.6524/2024. 2. For orders on CMA No.6658/2022. 3. For orders on CMA No.6659/2022. 4. For examination of parties/settlement of issues. 16.10.2024 Mr. Khursheed Javed, advocate for the plaintiff. Mr. Umer Farooq, advocate for the defendants No.1 & 2. Mr. Salman Ahmed Khan, advocate for the defendant No.3. Mr. Rehman Ghani Khattak, advocate for the defendant No.8. Mr. Irfan Ali, advocate for the defendant. Joint statement filed by the plaintiff and the defendants is taken on record. It is stated that parties have resolved their dispute out of court and defendants No.1 and 2 shall return the earnest money to the plaintiff within a period of 15 days. In view hereof, it is jointly submitted that suit has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Khuhro/PA
